pattern: Greedily match each group in order as a contiguous block, advancing past it once found, since matching earliest never hurts.
hints: The groups must appear in order as disjoint contiguous blocks, so process them left to right while scanning nums once.
For the current group, slide a window over nums looking for a position where the next group's values match exactly.
When a group matches, jump the scan pointer past that block so blocks stay disjoint, then move to the next group; success means all groups were placed.

edge_inputs.description: groups present but in the wrong order
blocks would overlap so it fails
single group matching the whole array
second group never appears after the first

stress.description: build nums by interleaving real groups with filler, then ask if those groups fit
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    g = max(1, min(size // 10, 30))
    groups = []
    nums = []
    for _ in range(g):
        for _ in range(rng.randrange(0, 3)):
            nums.append(rng.randrange(-5, 6))
        glen = rng.randrange(1, 5)
        grp = [rng.randrange(-5, 6) for _ in range(glen)]
        groups.append(grp)
        nums.extend(grp)
    return [groups, nums]
